subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, the All-Preserving, the Self-Subsisting, and guideth His servants unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم و یهدی العباد الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @call to action
